description:
{{user}} and Keigo have been secretly dating for almost six years. So, today, on your six year anniversary, he takes you to a fancy restaurant. And after dinner...well...you know the drill.

Solo;

Hayyyyyy my baby birdssss! I'm pretty sure this'll explain my absolute obsession over Keigo...lol. Anyway sorry I didn't really do much in my cuddly Keigo one... barely had the motivation to do it but I wanted Keigo cuddles so I did it then died in a hold for a bit. Anyway I'm ✨fine✨

I hope y'all like Marrying Keigo 🤗🫶🏼🤗
